## Summary

<!-- What detection(s) are added or changed, and why? -->

## Detection details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| File(s) | `detections/.../` |
| MITRE ATT&CK | T |
| Status | draft / testing / production |

## Changes

- [ ] New detection
- [ ] Updated existing detection (increment `version` and update `modified` date)
- [ ] Status change only

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate.py --no-splunk <file>` passes locally
- [ ] SPL logic reviewed against sample data or test environment
- [ ] Thresholds are justified (not default copy/paste)
- [ ] MITRE ATT&CK tags reflect the actual technique

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know: data source requirements, known false-positive scenarios, tuning recommendations -->
